Data Processing and MAR Workflow Note — Orphadine BioTech SE (EU regulated market issuer)
Controller: Orphadine BioTech SE, Norlandia Trade Register NRTR-2026-045128; Corporate Tax/VAT: NR-BTX-204-7719
Registered office: 12 Quai d'Aldren, 1040 Valmora, Norlandia; contact: privacy@orphadine-se.eu; public helpline: 0800 000 000 (not for rights requests)
Data Protection Officer (role): dpo@orphadine-se.eu; Attn: Ms. Elira Vond, Senior Legal Counsel, elira.vond@orphadine-se.eu; switchboard +350 600 000 000
Processing purposes: MAR Art 18 insider list management, Art 17(4) delay logs, pseudonymised trading plan data for liquidity management, and CSRD/SFDR reporting workpapers; whistleblowing triage under GDPR Art 9(2)(b),(g)
Data categories: employee IDs, board mobile numbers (+33 7 00 00 00 00), work emails, Norlandia Passport Nos. e.g., NRV9938451, biometric access hashes, and IBAN (fictional) XX00 NORB 0000 1234 5678 90 for expense controls
Note: legacy templates display generic fields such as "Name:", "Address:", and "Phone:" and may contain placeholders that are not completed
Special category data limited to HR/Legal; medical accommodations and trade union membership processed only on a documented Art 9 basis and subject to strict access
Cross-border transfers: insider list pseudonyms and audit logs sent to Aurelia Cloud Services Ltd. (Aurelia) under 2021 SCCs; TIA ref NR-TIA-2026-14; UK subprocessor under adequacy; encryption at rest and in transit
Retention: insider lists 5 years post-disclosure; MAR-relevant communications 7 years; CSRD/SFDR working papers 10 years; deletion recorded in NR-ROPA-REG-8841
Access rights: DSAR portal https://rights.orphadine-se.eu; identity verification may request last 4 of staff number and a masked copy of Norlandia ID; do not send DSARs to helpdesk@company.com
Template identifiers: EU0000000000 (security code placeholder) and NR000000000B00 (VAT example) may appear in drafts and are not operative identifiers
Inside information handling: draft CSRD target revisions and unannounced green instrument timetable are MNPI until public release on the regulated market and notification to the NCA
Lawful bases: Art 6(1)(c) for regulatory obligations, Art 6(1)(f) for fraud controls; LIA record NR-LIA-2026-03 available on request via compliance@orphadine-se.eu
Security controls: role-based access, quarterly recertification; audit ref NR-AUD-IT-5927; change ticket CT-NR-00941 for DLP enablement in email gateway
Record of processing contacts: Mr. D. Hevel (Interim CCO) compliance@orphadine-se.eu; fallback role-only contact "Insider List Coordinator"
